subcodes.first_line: At this time, it hath appeared meet unto this evanescent one to submit a statement concerning the items sent by the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این حین بنظر اینفانی آمد که فقره عرض شود درباره اشیاء مرسله از نزد دوستان
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @thankfulness; gratitude
